title: The Depths of Impel Down: Key Exchange
description: In the Impel Down storyline, this section centers on Blackbeard, Unknown person #4, Magellan, Luffy, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #5 as the scene develops across pages 9–12.
scene: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Blackbeard, Unknown person #4, Magellan, Luffy, Unknown person #12, focusing on the immediate stakes of the depths of impel down: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Thank God...!! The warden has arrived!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: you won't be coming back alive!!!

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: This panic is perfect for us....!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: EHHA!!? Didn't we beat that guy!!?

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: Their abnormal resilience is their strong point.

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: The boss of hell is coming quickly.

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: We've received information that black- beard

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
